checkbox.name: Life 4 Override
checkbox.desc: Changes health to use the Life 4 system. Life is an aspect of Etterna which is largely not relevant to the meta of setting scores close / above a file's MSD (93% rating or AA). Performing poorly enough to fail largely means that you're playing a file that's far out of your ability.

checkbox.name: Wife 3 Accuracy
checkbox.desc: Replaces the accuracy of the player with Epoch's implementation of Wife 3. Wife 3 replaces the discrete hit windows with a mathematical formula that punishes poor PA (i.e. high Great counts) and incentivises reducing hits in the Great window, as well as giving players less reason to sloppily hold onto a section than to cleanly play it with a miss. This is known as 'Complex Accuracy' in Kade Engine.
